sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, and GRA source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.def: apply an ointment or pigment, smear with, anoint

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote:
<L>2267<pc>11,1<k1>aYj<k2>aYj<e>1
<s>aYj</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 7. <ab>P.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>ana/kti</s>, <s>aNkte/</s>, <s>AnaYja</s>, <s>aYjizyati</s> or <s>aNkzyati</s>, <s>AYjIt</s>, <s>aYjitum</s> or <s>aNktum</s>, to apply an ointment or pigment, smear with, anoint;
<div n="to"/>to decorate, prepare;
<div n="to"/>to honour, celebrate;
<div n="to"/>to cause to appear, make clear, <ls>RV. i, 92, 1</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to be beautiful, <ls>L.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to go, <ls>L.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>aYjayat</s>, <s>AYjijat</s>, to smear with;
<div n="to"/>to speak;
<div n="to"/>to shine;
<div n="to"/>to cause to go, <ls>L.</ls> <info whitneyroots="aYj,2"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="7P,7Ā"/>
<LEND>

<L>1052<pc>1-0076<k1>aYj<k2>aYj
{#aYj#}¦, {#ana/kti, aYja/nti#} (auch {#aYja/ti#}
<ls>ṚV. 5,43,7.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">9,109,20.</ls> <ab>vgl.</ab> auch unten <ab>u.</ab> {#ni), AnaYja, aYjitA#} oder {#aNktA, aYjizyati#} oder {#aNkzyati, AYjIt, AYjizus, aYjitvA, aNktvA#} oder {#aktvA, akta#}
<ls>P. 6,4,23.</ls> <ls n="P.">7,2,71.</ls> <ls n="P.">7,2,62</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<ls>VOP. 14,3.</ls> <ls n="VOP. 14,">4.</ls> <ls n="VOP.">26,207.</ls> {#anajyAt#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,31,4.</ls> In den <is>Veden</is> auch <ab>med.</ab>
<div n="1"> 1) {%ungere, salben, bestreichen, beschmieren%}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 29,21.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 14,3.</ls> <ab>act.</ab>: {#pa\To a^naktu\ maDvA^ Gf\tena^#}
<ls>VS. 27,12.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#a\Yjate\ vya^Yjate\ sama^Yjate\ kratu^M rihanti\ maDu^nA\ByaYja^te#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,86,43.</ls> {#goBi^raYjA\naH#} (passivisch)
<ls n="ṚV. 9,">103,2.</ls> <ab>pass.</ab>: {#maDo\rDArA^Birajyase#}
<ls n="ṚV.">3,40,6.</ls> {#akta/m#}
<ls>Uṇ. 3,88.</ls> {#SaraBfzwIH sarpizAktAH#}
<ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 6,4,12.</ls> {#GftAkta#}
<ls>M. 9,60.</ls> {#snehAkta#}
<ls n="M.">5,25.</ls> <ls>R. 5,56,139.</ls> {#ameDyAkta#}
<ls>M. 5,126.</ls>
<ls>YĀJÑ. 1,191.</ls> {#daDyaktAMScAkzatAn#}
<ls>MIT. 147,14.</ls> {#SoRitAkta#}
<ls>MBH. 2,2592.</ls>

{#vizAkta#}
<ls>AK. 2,8,2,56.</ls>
<ls>H. 779.</ls> {#havizAkta ivAnalaH#}
<ls>R. 4,31,16.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%schmücken, zurüsten%}, <ab>act.</ab>: {#yaktvA\ hotA^rama\naja^nmi\yeDe^#}
<ls>ṚV. 3,19,5.</ls> {#i\mAM vAca^manajA#} (2 <ab>pl.</ab>) {#parvata\cyute^#}
<ls n="ṚV.">5,54,1.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#sa\mA\nama\Yjate Su\Be kam#}
<ls n="ṚV.">7,57,3.</ls> {#de\vezu\ Diya^ Ana\je#}
<ls n="ṚV.">8,52,1.</ls> ({#agniH#}).{# a\YjA\naH#} (passivisch) {#sa\pta hotf^Birha\vizma^te#}
<ls n="ṚV.">3,10,4.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%verherrlichen, ehren%}, <ab>act.</ab>: {#A\yuM na yaM nama^sA rA\taha^vyA a\Yjanti^#}
<ls>ṚV. 6,11,4.</ls> {#a\gnirde\vA~ a^naktu naH#}
<ls n="ṚV.">8,39,1.</ls> <ls>VS. 23,8.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#yu\vAM ya\jYEH pra^Ta\mA goBi^raYjate#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,151,8.</ls> passivisch: {#a\sya sto\tre Di\zaRA\ yatta^ Ana\je#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,102,1.</ls> {#sami^dDezva\gnizvA^najA\nA#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">108,4.</ls> {#kratu^BirAnaje#}
<ls n="ṚV.">8,52,1.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {%erscheinen lassen, darstellen%}
<ls>DHĀTUP.</ls> <ls>VOP. 14,3.</ls> <ab>act.</ab>: {#mA nAYjI rAkzasIrmAyAH#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 9,49.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#pUrve\ arDe\ raja^so BA\numa^Yjate#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,92,1.</ls>
<div n="1">— 5) {#kAntO#} und
<div n="1"> 6) {#gatO#}
<ls>DHĀTUP.</ls> — <ab>Caus.</ab> {#aYjayati, AYjijat#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%bestreichen%}: {#aYjayitvA#}
<ls>ĀŚV. ŚR. 1,7.</ls> {#nAYjayantIM svake netre#}
<ls>M. 4,44.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%sprechen%} oder {%leuchten%}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 33,112.</ls> — <ab>Desid.</ab> {#aYjijizati#}
<ls>P. 7,2,74.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 19,7.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#aDi#} {%ausrüsten%}: {#A\Ngi\ra\so 'Dya^kto naH pu\rohi^taH#}
<ls>AV. 10,1,6.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#antar#} {%in sich aufnehmen%}: {#a\ntarma^hi\mAna^mAnaYja\ DIra^H#}
<ls>VS. 8,30.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#aBi#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%salben, bestreichen%}, <ab>act.</ab>: {#navanItenAByaYjanti#}
<ls>AIT. BR. 1,3.</ls> <ab>med.</ab> <ab>s. u.</ab> {#aYj#} 1. {#aByakta#} {%gesalbt%}
<ls>M. 4,44.</ls>
<ls>ŚĀK. 108.</ls> {#GftAByakta#}
<ls>YĀJÑ. 1,68.</ls> {#vEdyopadizwEraByaNgEraByaktaH#}
<ls>VID. 180.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%schmücken%}: {#a\YjA\no a\jarE^ra\Bi#}
<ls>ṚV. 2,8,4.</ls> {#a\Bya1^\ktAktA\ sva^raMkftA#}
<ls>AV. 10,1,25.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#A#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%salben%}: {#akziRI AYjya#}
<ls>ĀŚV. GṚHY. 4,6.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%glätten, zurichten%}: {#A no^ daDi\krA pa\TyA^manaktu#}
<ls>ṚV. 7,44,5.</ls>
<ls>AV. 10,1,25.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%ehren, ehrenvoll aufnehmen%}: {#A vA\M nakza^nto\ adra^ya AYjan#}
<ls>ṚV. 6,63,3.</ls> {#A tvA^manaktu\ praya^tA ha\vizma^tI#}
<ls>ṚV. 8,49,1.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ni#}
<div n="1"> 1) <ab>act.</ab> {%einsalben, bestreichen%}: {#yaTA\ makzA^ i\daM maDu^ naya\Yjati\ maDA\vaDi^#}

<ls n="AV.">18,3,41.</ls> {#nyajya#}
<ls>KĀTY. 16,6,8.</ls> bei <ls>MAHĪDH.</ls> zu <ls>VS. 11,83.</ls>

<ls>ṚV. 1,161,4.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#pra#} {%schmücken, verschönern%}: ({#hara^ya\H) pra ye dvi\tA di\va a\YjantyAtAH (fYjanti?#})

<div n="p">— {#vi#}

<ls>ṚV. 9,86,43</ls> (<ab>vgl.</ab> oben <ab>u.</ab> {#aYj#} 1.).

<ls>ṚV. 8,7,25.</ls> {#a\YjiBi\rvyA^najre#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,87,1.</ls> {#vya^kta#} {%herausgeputzt, ansehnlich, einen guten Anschein habend%}
<ls>ṚV. 7,56,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 7,">77,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">9,71,7.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,14,9.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 10,">86,5.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 10,">127,7.</ls>
<ls>VĀLAKH. 7,4.</ls>

<ls>MBH. 2,2122.</ls> {#akiMcanatvaM vyanakti#}

<ls>RAGH. 13,12.</ls> {#purupavyatyayena parihAso vyajyate#}

<ls>R. 3,73,12.</ls> {#parastasmAttu BAvo 'nyo 'vyakto vyaktAtsanAtanaH#}
<ls>BHAG. 8,20.</ls> {#madAvyaktAkzarapada#}
<ls>R. 4,9,65.</ls> {%hell, klar%}: {#suvyaktalocana#}
<ls>R. 6,95,24.</ls> {#vyaktam#} <lex>adv.</lex> {%offenbar, deutlich, gewiss%}
<ls>BRĀHMAṆ. 1,33.</ls> <ls>SĀV. 5,92.</ls> <ls>R. 1,77,27.</ls> <ls n="R.">3,67,22.</ls> <ls n="R.">4,55,15.</ls> <ls n="R.">5,77,11.</ls> <ls n="R. 5,">85,10.</ls> <ls n="R. 5,85,">11.</ls> <ls n="R. 5,85,">13.</ls> <ls n="R.">6,82,119.</ls> <ab>Vgl.</ab> auch <ab>u.</ab> {#vyakta#} und {#avyakta#} . — <ab>Caus.</ab> {#vyaYjayati#} {%zur Erscheinung bringen, offenbaren, an den Tag legen%}: {#svayaMBUrBagavAnavyakto vyaYjayannidam#}
<ls>M. 1,6.</ls> {#anAryatA nizWuratA#} <ab>u. s. w.</ab>
[Page1-0078]
{#puruzaM vyaYjayanti kaluzayonijam#}
<ls n="M.">10,58.</ls> {#praRayaM vyaYjayantIva#}

<ls>RAGH. 10,35.</ls>
<ls>MEGH. 30.</ls>

<ls>RAGH. 6,12.</ls> {#pUraBivyaktamuKaprasAdA#}

<ls>YĀJÑ. 1,348.</ls>
<ls>N. 17,7.</ls>

<ls>VS. 29,2.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#saM ba\rhira^NktAM ha\vizA^ Gf\tena^#}
<ls n="VS.">2,22.</ls>

<ls>ṚV. 3,38,3.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#pa\SUnviSvA^ntsamAna\je#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,188,9.</ls> {#gira\H sama^Yje#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">64,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">61,5.</ls> {#ya\jYena\ dakzi^RayA\ sama^ktAH#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,62,1.</ls>

<ls>ṚV. 2,3,7.</ls>
<ls>VS. 20,44.</ls> {#goBirno aSvEH samanaktu yajYam#}
<ls>TAITT. BR. 3,1,1,12.</ls> {#yajuzA samaktO (aSvinO)#}
<ls n="TAITT. BR.">3,1,2,13.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {%zusammenfügen, verbinden%}: {#sama^Yjantu\ viSve^ de\vA hfda^yAni nO#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,85,47.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 10,">110,10.</ls> <ab>pass.</ab>: {#saM rU\pEra^jyate\ hari^H#}
<ls n="ṚV.">9,34,4.</ls> {#goBirnakzatraM paSuBiH samaktam#}

<L>1430<pc>1-017-b<k1>aYj<k2>aYj √{#aYj#}¦ {#ana/kti#} und {#aNkte/#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%salben, bestreichen, beschmieren;%} <ab>Med.</ab> {%sich salben, sich Salbe überstreichen%} <ls n="Chr.">13,16</ls>. <ls n="Chr.">237,18</ls>. {#GftAkta#} <ls n="Chr.">192,1</ls>. {#ruDirAkta#} <ls n="Chr.">191,22</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%schmücken, ausrüsten;%} <ab>Med.</ab> {%sich schmücken%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%verherrlichen, ehren%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%an den Tag legen%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%bestreichen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#anu#} {%bestreichen%} <ls n="Chr.">30,32</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#antar#} {%in sich aufnehmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%salben, bestreichen;%} <ab>Med.</ab> {%sich salben, sich bestreichen%} <ls n="Chr.">237,18</ls>. {#tElalavaRAByakta#} <ls n="Chr.">218,4</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%schmücken%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#A#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%salben%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%glätten, ebnen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%verherrlichen, ehren%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#samA#} {%gemeinsam salben%} <ls>KAUŚ. 79</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#} ({#anakti#}) {%in die Höhe heben%} <ls>ṚV. 4,6,3</ls>. Gehört der <ab>Bed.</ab> nach zu {#ac#} <div n="p">— Mit {#upa#} {%einschmieren%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ni#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%einsalben%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 <ab>Med.</ab> {%hineinschlüpfen in%} ({#antar#}) {#nya^kta#} {%in einem Andern enthalten, [Page1-017-c] inhärirend%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#prati#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%bestreichen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%schmücken%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 <ab>Med.</ab> {%durchsalben%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 <ab>Med.</ab> {%Sich salben, — herausputzen; sich ein Ansehen verschaffen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%offenbaren, an den Tag legen%} <ls>Spr. 7820</ls>. {#vyakta#} (<ab>s.</ab> auch <ab>bes.</ab>) {%offenbar, sinnlich wahrnehmbar, verständlich%}. {#vyaktam#} <lex>Adv.</lex> {%offenbar, deutlich; sicher, gewiss%} <ls n="Chr.">38,23</ls>. <ls n="Chr.">180,2</ls>. <ls n="Chr.">319,26</ls>. <ls n="Chr.">326,7</ls>. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%offenbaren, an den Tag legen, klar machen%} <ls n="Chr.">190,18</ls>. <ls>Ind. St. 9,20</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#anuvi#} {%deutlich —, klar werden%} (!) <ls>Comm. zu AV. PRĀT. 4,107</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBivi#} <ab>Pass.</ab> an den Tag treten, erscheinen <ls n="Chr.">267,30</ls>. {#aBivyakta#} {%offenbar, deutlich hervortretend%}. {#˚m#} <lex>Adv.</lex> {%offenbar%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%besalben, schmücken%} <ls n="Chr.">37,20</ls>. <ls n="Chr. 37,">21</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%zubereiten, ausrüsten, ausstatten%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%verherrlichen%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%zusammenfügen, vereinigen%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%belecken, verzehren;%} <ab>Med.</ab> {%sich nähren mit%} (<ab>Instr.</ab>), {%geniessen%}. <LEND>

<L>208<pc>0023<k1>aYj<k2>aYj {@√añj,@}¦ Grundbedeutung „schmieren, mit einer weichen, fetten Masse bestreichen“ (<ls>Kuhnʼs Zeitschr. 〔1,384〕</ls>), daher 1〉 die Büchse [<ab>A.</ab>] des Rades {%schmieren;%} 2〉 jemand [<ab>A.</ab>] womit [<ab>I.</ab>] {%salben;%} 3〉 <ab>med.</ab> {%sich%} womit [<ab>I.</ab>] {%salben;%} 4〉 <ab>med.</ab> {%sich%} Salbe {%überstreichen%}. Diese sinnlichen Bedeutungen werden nun ausserdem in dichterischen Bildern, in denen die ursprüngliche Anschauung meist klar hervortritt, mannichfach übertragen; nämlich 5〉 jemand [<ab>A.</ab>] womit [<ab>I.</ab>] {%schmücken,%} auch 6〉 ohne <ab>Instr.</ab>, oder 7〉 {%verschönen, verherrlichen%} [<ab>A.</ab>] durch [<ab>I.</ab>], auch ohne <ab>Instr.</ab>, oder 8〉 etwas [<ab>A.</ab>] für jemand [<ab>D.</ab>] {%ausschmücken, zurüsten;%} namentlich 9〉 den Agni <ab>u. s. w.</ab> [<ab>A.</ab>] mit Fett <ab>u. s. w.</ab> [<ab>I.</ab>] {%beträufeln,%} auch 10〉 ohne <ab>Instr.</ab>, oder 11〉 den Soma [<ab>A.</ab>] mit Milch <ab>u. s. w.</ab> [<ab>I.</ab>] {%fett, süss machen%} (auch ohne <ab>Instr.</ab>), oder auch 12〉 das Somagefäss [<ab>A.</ab>] damit gleichsam {%salben;%} 13〉 {%besalben,%} [Page24] <ab>d. h.</ab> {%besamen%} [<ab>A.</ab>]; ferner im Medium 14〉 sich womit [<ab>I.</ab>] {%schmücken,%} oder 15〉 {%sich%} etwas [<ab>A.</ab>] {%als Schmuck anlegen%}. Ausserdem tritt, wie bei allen Verben im RV, das Medium statt des Activs ein, sobald irgendeine Zurückbeziehung auf das Subject stattfinden soll, <ab>z. B.</ab> {64,1} marúdbhias ‥ gíras sám añje „den Marutʼs schmücke ich {%meine%} Lieder aus“. <div n="Pf">Mit {@abhí,@} {%schmücken%} [<ab>A.</ab>] mit [<ab>I.</ab>]. <div n="Pf">{@ā́@} 1〉 die Bahn [<ab>A.</ab>] {%schmieren%} (um rascher fortzukommen); 2〉 {%verherrlichen%} [<ab>A.</ab>]. <div n="Pf">{@ní,@} {%hinunterschlüpfen, sich verstecken%} unter [antár <ab n="mit">m.</ab> <ab>Lo.</ab>]. <div n="Pf">{@prá,@} jemandem [<ab>D.</ab>] etwas [<ab>A.</ab>] {%ausschmücken,%} es ihm {%zurüsten%}. <div n="Pf">{@práti,@} {%schmücken%} [<ab>A.</ab>]. <div n="Pf">{@ví,@} <ab>med.</ab> 1〉 {%sich salben, sich herausputzen%} mit [<ab>I.</ab>], auch 2〉 ohne <ab>Instr.</ab>, oder dafür 3〉 mit dem <ab>Acc.</ab> der Salbe oder des Schmuckes; 4〉 {%durchsalben;%} 5〉 {%glänzend, geschmückt erscheinen%}. <div n="Pf">{@sám@} 1〉 womit [<ab>I.</ab>] {%salben, schmücken%} [<ab>A.</ab>], auch 2〉 ohne <ab>Instr.</ab>, 3〉 jemandem [<ab>D.</ab>] etwas [<ab>A.</ab>] {%ausschmücken, zurüsten,%} oder 4〉 jemand [<ab>A.</ab>] wozu [<ab>D.</ab>] {%ausschmücken, ausstatten;%} 5〉 {%ausschmücken, herrlich machen, verherrlichen%} [<ab>A.</ab>]; 6〉 {%zusammenfügen, vereinigen%} [<ab>A.</ab>]; 7〉 {%belecken, verzehren%} [<ab>A.</ab>]; 8〉 <ab>med.</ab> {%sich%} womit [<ab>I.</ab>] {%nähren,%} es {%geniessen%}. <div n="H">Stamm {@añj, anáj:@} <div n="TS">-nákti 7〉 vām {153,2} (hótā). <div n="TS">-nakti 6〉 paśvás {302,3}; dámpatī. {894,2}. <div n="TS">-ñjatas [<per>3.</per> <ab>du.</ab>] {@sám@} 5〉 devā́n {194,7}. <div n="TS">-ñjmas 11〉 tvā́m góbhis {757,3}. <div n="TS">-ñjánti 7〉 yám (agním) námasā {452,4}. — 9〉 yám havírbhis {95,6}; pūrviám havírbhis {248,3}; mitrám ná góbhis {357,2}. — 10〉 yám {397,7}. — 11〉 enam mádhuas rásena {821,20}. — {@sam@} 5〉 oder 7〉 yád {878,3} (devā́s). <div n="TS">-nák [<per>3.</per> <ab>s.</ab>] {@ví@} 5〉 śroṇás {206,7}. <div n="TS">-nájan 6〉 tvā hótāram {253,5}. <div n="TS">-ñjan {@sám@} 2〉 śiśum ná {518,5}. — 4〉 ródasī kṣatrā́ya {272,3}. <div n="TS">-ṅgdhi {@sám@} 1〉 vánaspátim mádhvā dhā́rayā {717,10}. <div n="TS">-ṅdhí [für -ṅgdhí] 1〉 khám {982,3}. <div n="TS">-naktu 7〉 devā́n {659,1}. — ā́ 1〉 pathíām {560,5}. — 2〉 vidathíām {559,3}; tvā́m {669,1}. — {@sám@} 2〉 devā́n {194,2}. — 4〉 (nas) ājarasā́ya {911,43}. <div n="TS">-naktana 7〉 índram <ab>u. s. w.</ab> {902,1}. <div n="TS">-ñjantu {@sám@} 1〉 vām aktúbhis matīnā́m {510,3}. — 6〉 hṛ́dayāni nau {911,47}. <div n="TS">-ñje [<per>1.</per> <ab>s.</ab> <ab>med.</ab>] {@sám@} 3〉 índrāya arkám {61,5}; marúdbhyas gíras {64,1}. <div n="TS">-ṅkté {@sam@} 8〉 kravíṣā {913,16}. <div n="TS">-ṅkte 4〉 añjí {124,8}; {649,1}. — 3〉 oder <ab>pass.</ab> 9〉 góbhis {355,3}. <div n="TS">-ñjaté [<per>3.</per> <ab>pl.</ab>] 6〉 yajñám {814,7}. <div n="TS">-ñjáte [<per>3.</per> <ab>pl.</ab>] 11〉 (sómam) {798,43}. <div n="TS">-ñjate 3〉 oder <ab>pass.</ab> 9〉 mádhvā {681,9}. — 4〉 añjí {573,3}. — 3〉 oder <ab>pass.</ab> 11〉 góbhis {722,3}. — 9〉 yuvā́m góbhis {151,8}. — 15〉 bhānúm {92,1}. — {@abhí@} mádhunā (sómam) {798,43}. — {@ví@} [Page25] 1〉 añjíbhis {64,4}. — 3〉 aktū́n {595,2}. — 4〉 (sómam) {798,43}. — {@sám@} 2〉 (sómam) {798,43}. — 1〉 rūpám apā́m rásena {809,57}. <div n="TS">-ñjata {@ví@} 1〉 śubhrā́s {627,25} (śriyé). <div n="H"><ab>Imperf.</ab> {@ā́ñj@} [tonlos {504,3}]: <div n="TS">-jan ā́ 2〉 vām {504,3} (ádrayas). — {@sam@} 1〉 yám (agním) ā́jiena {914,4}. <div n="H"><ab>Perf.</ab> {@ānaj:@} <div n="TS">-jé [<per>3.</per> <ab>s.</ab>] 7〉 yásya dvā́rā dhíyas {672,1}. — 8〉 <ab>pass.</ab> dhiṣáṇā te {102,1}. — {@sam@} 5〉 paśū́n {188,9}. <div n="TS">-je [<per>3.</per> <ab>s.</ab>] 14〉 krátubhis {672,1}. — {@ní@} tváṣṭā gnā́su antár {161,4}. <div n="TS">-jre {@ví@} 1〉 usrā́s iva stṛ́bhis {87,1}. <div n="H">{@anaj@} [aus ānaj metrisch verkürzt]: <div n="TS">-ja [-jā <per>2.</per> <ab>pl.</ab>] {@prá@} vā́cam śárdhāya mā́rutāya {408,1}. <div n="TS">-jyāt [<ab>Opt.</ab>] 9〉 góbhis īm {857,4}. <div n="H">Stamm <ab n="des">d.</ab> <ab>Pass.</ab> {@ajyá@} [<ab>vgl.</ab> aj]: <div n="TS">-áse {@sam@} 1〉 góbhis {798,47} (camúos). <div n="H">{@ajya:@} <div n="TS">-ase<chg type="del" n="3" src="gra"><old>7〉 góbhis vāṇás {640,8}. —</old></chg> 9〉 mádhos dhā́rābhis {274,6}. — 11〉 rebhás váne {778,9}; kavís váne {790,2}. <div n="TS">-ate 8〉 túbhya rayís {1020,9}. — 9〉 srucā́ {944,3}. — 11〉 góbhis {744,3} (sómas). — {@sám@} 1〉 yajñás mádhvā {188,2}; agnís gāyatréna {188,11}; agnís ghṛténa {944,4}; aktúbhis {251,1}; sómas dhenúbhis {784,1}; háris (sómas) rūpaís {746,4}. <div n="H"><ab>Part.</ab> {@añját:@} <div n="TS">-án 6〉 svárum ná péśas {92,5}. — {@práti@} dhā́māni {194,2}. — {@sam@} 1〉 pathás mádhvā {936,2}. — 2〉 pā́thas {936,10}; ródasī {906,1}. — 7〉 vīrúdhas {871,4} (agnís). <div n="H">{@añjāná:@} <div n="TS">-ás 10〉 <ab>pass.</ab> saptá hótṛbhis {244,4}. — 11〉 <ab>pass.</ab> góbhis {762,5}; {815,2}; {819,22}. — {@abhí@} <ab>pass.</ab> ajárais {199,4}. <div n="TS">-ā́s [<ab>A.</ab> <ab>p.</ab> <ab>f.</ab>] 4〉 añjí {354,9} (kaníās). <div n="H"><ab>Part.</ab> <ab>Perf.</ab> {@ānajāná:@} <div n="TS">-ā́ [<ab>du.</ab>] 7〉 <ab>pass.</ab> {108,4} (agníṣu sámiddheṣu). <div n="H"><ab>Part.</ab> <ab>Pass.</ab> {@ajyámāna@} (<ab>vgl.</ab> aj): <div n="TS">-as 10〉 agnís {857,9}. — 11〉 sómas {809,35}. <div n="TS">-ā [<ab>f.</ab>] 13〉 starī́s yád sū́ta sadyás 〰 {857,10}. <div n="H"><ab>Part.</ab> II. {@aktá:@} <div n="TS">-ás 7〉 vácobhis {446,6}. — 9〉 śocíṣā {445,6}; páyasā pṛṣṭhíena {299,10}. — 11〉 góbhis {808,22}. <div n="TS">-ám [<ab>m.</ab>] 5〉 patamgám māyáyā {1003,1}. — 12〉 kaláśam góbhis {323,5}; {786,8}. <div n="TS">-ám [<ab>n.</ab>] 2〉 barhís ghṛténa {194,4}. <div n="TS">-ā́ [<ab>f.</ab>] 5〉 uṣā́s vápurbhis {62,8}. <div n="H">{@akta@} [<ab>vgl.</ab> ā́la‿akta]: <div n="TS">-as {@ví@} 5〉 kavís {783,7}. <div n="TS">-am [<ab>n.</ab>] {@ví@} 1〉 avasā́nam aktúbhis {840,9}. — 2〉 támas {953,7}. — {@sám@} 2〉 havyám {194,10} (trídhā). <div n="TS">-ās [<ab>m.</ab>] {@ví@} 2〉 náras {572,1}. — {@sám@} 1〉 áṅgirasas dákṣinayā {888,1}. <div n="TS">-ā [<ab>n.</ab>] {@ví@} 2〉 taṣṭā́ni {912,5}. <div n="TS">-ā [<ab>f.</ab>] {@ví@} 1〉 uṣā́s raśmíbhis {593,3}. <div n="TS">-ām {@ví@} 5〉 anyā́m {911,21}. <LEND>
